title: Filter Specific Dates & Time Tracking Column
excerpt:

posts.author: corjlsoftware (Corjl)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be helpful to have the ability to filter specific dates (like a pay period) and view this on the dashboard.

Also, to have the ability to filter dates in the time tracking feature. Currently when selecting the time tracking box, it will bring up all session times tracked on the item. We would like to be able to pull a record by specific dates using a filter.

posts.author: EllieCopperLeaf (Ellie Sykes)
posts.cookedHtml: I am desperately trying to find a fix for this! I can’t bill per month without manually working out how long the team have spent on various tasks in a certain month. Very frustrating!
